title: Add per-item misclassification classification to the evaluation RCA pipeline
description:
## Summary
Add a per-item misclassification-classification stage to the evaluation RCA pipeline.

## Deliverables
- For each incorrect item, classify it into exactly one of the four categories.
- Use all relevant per-item context available to the evaluation pipeline.
- Keep this classification stage distinct from the optimization-focused RCA stage.
- Ensure only `score_configuration_problem` items feed into score-fix recommendation logic.

## Dependency note
This work should align with the RCA pipeline work under the reliability epic so the result persists reliably.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Dependency plx-e3a500 completed: canonical item context/provenance payload now available in RCA exemplars. Next implementation step: run per-item classification over incorrect items and persist primary_category/rationale/confidence/evidence_snippets for each item in RCA payload.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented per-item misclassification classification in RCA pipeline (standard and small-set). Each exemplar now includes misclassification_classification with primary_category, rationale, confidence, and evidence_snippets, derived from canonical item context. Recommendation logic now explicitly gates score-configuration suggestions to items classified as score_configuration_problem only; non-score-fix categories are excluded from config-change prompts.
